## PERM (Labor Certification)

## Our Chicago Immigration Attorneys Offer a Comprehensive Understanding of PERM (Labor Certification) Laws
Minsky, McCormick & Hallagan, P.C. specializes in helping businesses and employees navigate the complex PERM labor certification process to secure employment-based green cards. With extensive experience in handling PERM applications across various industries, including insurance, information technology, software development, data processing, finance, trading, architecture, business, manufacturing, automotive, construction, transportation, home care, and more, our immigration attorneys in Chicago guide employers and foreign workers through every step, ensuring compliance with U.S. Department of Labor requirements. Whether you’re sponsoring a professional with an advanced degree (EB-2), professional (EB-3), skilled worker (EB-3), or other workers or seeking permanent residency through employment, our immigration attorneys in Chicago provide expert legal support tailored to your unique needs.
Failure to comply with U.S. Department of Labor requirements can result in the denial of PERM applications and debarment from the PERM program. Our immigration attorneys in Chicago are dedicated to helping employers and applicants avoid these risks by providing comprehensive legal support throughout the PERM process. We assist with:
- Evaluating your case to discuss and develop the most beneficial strategy.
- Drafting PERM job descriptions that comply with regulatory requirements.
- Filing a Prevailing Wage Request in accordance with U.S. Department of Labor guidelines.
- Preparing for recruitment and PERM filings, including developing retention policies to ensure compliance with documentation requirements.
- Submitting timely PERM applications in compliance with U.S. Department of Labor standards.
- Responding to PERM audits effectively.
- Preparing appeals to the Department of Labor and the Board of Alien Labor Certification Appeals.
With our strategic approach, Minsky, McCormick & Hallagan, P.C. helps employers navigate the complex PERM process and fully comply with all regulatory obligations.

## Call our Immigration Attorneys in Chicago to Keep You Compliant
Minsky, McCormick & Hallagan, P.C. is a leader in immigration law. Our immigration attorneys in Chicago know how to keep your company compliant with immigration law. Call us at (312) 427-6163 or contact us online for help. Our office is located on the Loop in downtown Chicago.
